## Summary

## Changes

## Testing

## Compatibility

Describe any impact on:

- public APIs;
- protocols;
- persistent formats;
- configuration;
- rolling upgrades;
- existing deployments.

Write `None` when there is no compatibility impact.

## Licensing and provenance

- [ ] I have the right to submit this contribution.
- [ ] I have not knowingly included code under an incompatible license.
- [ ] I have identified any third-party code included in this change.
- [ ] Every contributing commit includes a `Signed-off-by` line.
- [ ] I have reviewed any generated or AI-assisted code included in this contribution.

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests have been added or updated.
- [ ] Documentation has been added or updated.
- [ ] Formatting and lint checks pass.
- [ ] The change does not include unrelated modifications.
